name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: Tide's signature feature. Rust orchestration state machine manages multiple sequential Pi prompts — routing, planning, building step-by-step, and reviewing. Each phase uses a different system prompt and model. The user sees a pipeline progress UI and can approve the final changeset.
notes: Orchestration state machine lives in Rust (manages Pi process, spawns sequential prompts).
Each orchestration phase sends a different system prompt to Pi via send_prompt.
Builder phase executes one Pi prompt per plan step — marks steps done in .tide/features/ plan file.
Reviewer phase runs build/test commands (from TIDE.md) and reports issues.
User can bypass orchestration and send direct prompts (orchestration is opt-in).
Phase 8 (Code Index) provides token-efficient symbol retrieval for builder and reviewer steps.

tasks.title: Build Orchestration State Machine (Rust)
tasks.description: Core Rust module implementing the orchestration loop. States: Idle → Routing → Planning → Building → Reviewing → Complete. Each state transition triggers a specific Pi prompt with tailored system prompt. OrchestrationState stored in AppState. New Tauri command: orchestrate(prompt) that starts the state machine instead of sending a direct prompt.

tasks.title: Implement Builder Phase: Step-by-Step Execution
tasks.description: For planned tasks, the orchestrator sends one Pi prompt per plan step. Each prompt includes: the original task, the full plan JSON, which step to execute, and context from previous steps (files changed). On step completion, marks the step done in the .tide/features/<slug>.json plan file. Emits step_complete events to UI.

tasks.title: Implement Reviewer Phase
tasks.description: After the builder completes all steps, the orchestrator sends a review prompt. The reviewer system prompt instructs Pi to: (a) verify all plan steps were addressed, (b) run build command if configured in TIDE.md, (c) run test commands from TIDE.md, (d) report issues or sign off. Review results emitted as events to the UI.

tasks.title: Build Orchestration Progress UI
tasks.description: Visual pipeline progress indicator: Route → Plan → Build (step 2/5) → Review → Complete. Each phase shows its status (pending/active/done). Animated transitions between phases. Click a phase to see its details and output. orchestrationStore.ts tracks current state and emits updates from Pi events.

tasks.title: Build Multi-File Change Viewer
tasks.description: After an orchestrated task completes, show a summary of all files modified across all build steps. List with diff counts per file (lines added/removed). Click any file to see its full diff in DiffPreview. Approve/reject the entire changeset. ChangesetViewer.tsx component.
